Class StretchingTilePane

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
com.dlsc.gemsfx.StretchingTilePane
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class StretchingTilePane extends javafx.scene.layout.Pane
A specialized pane that can be used to display a list of tiles (nodes) in one or more rows. The pane first calculates how many tiles fit next to each other in a row and then arranges them in a grid. The tiles are stretched to fill the entire width of each row. All tiles have the same height and width.
Note: the main difference to the standard JavaFX TilePane is that the tiles are stretched to fill the entire width of each row.

CSS Styleable Properties:

CSS Properties
PropertyTypeDescription
-fx-hgapDoubleThe horizontal gap between tiles.
-fx-vgapDoubleThe vertical gap between tiles.

  • Property Details

    • hgap

      public final javafx.beans.property.DoubleProperty hgapProperty
      The horizontal gap between the tiles.

      Can be set via CSS using the -fx-hgap property. Valid values are: positive numbers. The default value is 0.

      See Also:
      • getHgap()
      • setHgap(double)
      • hgapProperty()

    • vgap

      public final javafx.beans.property.DoubleProperty vgapProperty
      The vertical gap between the tiles.

      Can be set via CSS using the -fx-vgap property. Valid values are: positive numbers. The default value is 0.

      See Also:
      • getVgap()
      • setVgap(double)
      • vgapProperty()

  • Constructor Details

    • StretchingTilePane

      public StretchingTilePane()
      Constructs a new tile pane with an horizontal gap of 0 and a vertical gap of 0.

    • StretchingTilePane

      public StretchingTilePane(double hgap, double vgap)
      Constructs a new tile pane with the given horizontal and vertical gap.
      Parameters:
      hgap - the horizontal gap between the tiles.
      vgap - the vertical gap between the tiles.

    • StretchingTilePane

      public StretchingTilePane(double hgap, double vgap, javafx.scene.Node... children)
      Constructs a new tile pane with the specified horizontal and vertical gaps and an optional list of child nodes.
      Parameters:
      hgap - the horizontal gap between the tiles.
      vgap - the vertical gap between the tiles.
      children - the child nodes to be added to the tile pane.
